title: Not interested!
description: Adds a way for you to tell the wandering trader to go away.
body:
This mod adds a button onto a wandering trader's trade screen - a button you can use to tell him to bugger off.

 

That's really all of it.

 

It's not much, author knows that, but a few days ago a wandering trader was chilling at the spot where the author was planning a vineyard so he felt inspired.

Yes, some of you already have a way to solve such problems, but this isn't a mod for murder-hobo-twelve-year-olds. This is a small mod for cultured folk who just want the trader to go away.

In multiplayer setting, the trader might select another player to visit, if there is one within walking distance but not too close. Otherwise, he'll just hit the road.


![title image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/moonfather1/not-interested/main/title.png)
